LanguageData.ArrowGrenade.label: Bownade
LanguageData.ArrowGrenade.description: Pull the pin and immediately shoot the arrow, or else.
LanguageData.ArrowMolotov.label: Bowlotov
LanguageData.ArrowMolotov.description: No need for accuracy when your arrows explode.
LanguageData.ArrowEMP.label: BowMP
LanguageData.ArrowEMP.description: Demonic servants of a sleeping god, meet 'demonic servant of a sleeping god'-stopper.
LanguageData.ArrowBattery.label: Bowttery
LanguageData.ArrowBattery.description: When the guns are gone and you can't go on.
